LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BETTY CAROL ROBINSON'S MOTION TO TRANSFER THIS ACTION TO THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT IS DENIED. THE PARTITION ACTION IS PROPERLY FILED AS A CIVIL ACTION. TO THE EXTENT THAT THE COMPLAINT RAISES ANY ISSUES THAT PERTAIN TO THE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF THE TRUST, SUCH ISSUES CAN BE BIFURCATED AT A LATER DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Set For Trial On Nov-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Motion To Transfer This Action To The Probate Dept
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Greer Smith, Esq. of the Law Offices of Greer Smith, Tel. 415.409.7123, for defendant and moving party;
Marc Seidenfeld, Esq. of the Law Offices of Marc Seidenfeld, Tel. 650.877.8253, for plaintiff and opposing party;
Ciaran O'Sullivan, Esq. of the Law Office of Ciaran O'Sullivan, Tel. 415.391.3711, specially appearing for dismissed defendant Michael James Cannon.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BETTY CAROL ROBINSON's Motion To Transfer This Action To The Probate Department is denied. The partition action is properly filed as a civil action. To the extent that the complaint raises any issues that pertain to the internal affairs of the trust, such issues can be bifurcated at a later date. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Joinder Of Deft James M Cannon In Motion Of Deft Robinson For Orer To Transfer This Action To The Probate Dept
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ciaran O'Sullivan, Esq. of the Law Office of Ciaran O'Sullivan, Tel. 415.391.3711, for dismissed defendant and moving party Michael James Cannon;
Marc Seidenfeld, Esq. of the Law Offices of Marc Seidenfeld, Tel. 650.877.8253, for plaintiff and opposing party;
Greer Smith, Esq. of the Law Offices of Greer Smith, Tel. 415.409.7123, for defendant Betty Carol Robinson.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAMES M. CANNON'S JOINDER IN THE MOTION OF DEFENDANT ROBINSON FOR ORDER TO TRANSFER THIS ACTION TO THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT is Off calendar as moot. This defendant was dismissed on January 24, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
